_meta.keyKnowledge: We are learning how complex and compound-complex sentences can be used to elaborate, extend and explain ideas in sophisticated ways.

_source.w: We are learning how complex and compound-complex sentences can be used to elaborate, extend and explain ideas in sophisticated ways.
y: Mastering complex sentence structures gives us the tools to express nuanced, layered thinking.
Varying sentence structure makes our writing more engaging and professional.
This grammatical skill is expected in academic writing across all subjects.
eg: We analyse compound-complex sentences in published texts and identify their constituent clauses.
We practise combining ideas from several simple sentences into one well-crafted complex sentence.
We use compound-complex sentences to add detail and nuance to our arguments.
We experiment with sentence length and complexity to create rhythm and emphasis in our writing.
We identify when a complex sentence structure improves clarity versus when simpler is better.
We edit our writing to vary sentence structures for greater effect.
